denomination_relation: Singular issuance-class unit; crystallizes completed exchange back into scarcity.
substrate: Solar-gold ceremonial coin, renderable as icon, card, minted face, and museum plate.
issuance_logic: Issued only when a canonical ITEM record represents a completed, historically fixed exchange event.
anti_entropy_claim: Preserves a completed exchange as a singular artifact that resists dissolution into ordinary circulation.
use_case: Canonical event marker, ceremonial denomination, high-finality artifact record.
visual_grammar: Radiant center, singular seal logic, ceremonial density, sharp denomination hierarchy.
color_grammar: Solar gold, warm white, bronze shadow, black ceremonial field.
geometric_grammar: Central seal, sunburst core, fixed outer ring, event-marker glyph.
legibility_constraints: Must read as finality and singular issuance at icon scale; avoid confusing it with generic gold coin art.
provenance: Derived from ACCRE–ITEM Currency Handshake and VMS triad semantics.
